name: chr20_20q13_2_PTPN1_SD
description: 20q13.13 SD region containing PTPN1 (PTP1B, insulin-signaling phosphatase) and PARD6B. Flanked by intermediate-size SD blocks of ~30-60 kb at 95-98% identity that contribute to occasional 20q13 amplicons in cancer.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct SDs of 30-60 kb at 95-98% identity flanking PTPN1; embedded in the 20q amplicon-prone region; somatic gain reported in breast / colorectal cancers.
